capabilities.title: What we build
capabilities.subtitle: We care more about whether a product is good to use and holds up over time than about how much new tech went into it.

items.title: AI Products
items.desc: Turning large models and agents into stable, useful features — not demos.

items.title: Digital Platforms
items.desc: From checkout to back office, a whole system that actually runs.

items.title: Mobile & Web Experiences
items.desc: Good-looking is the baseline; what matters more is that it feels right to use.

items.title: Systems That Scale
items.desc: Foundations that can be maintained and extended, and won't fall over as you grow.

work.title: Built for real life
work.subtitle: We don't just take on projects — we build our own. Machi and Shangence are two we're raising with care.

items.name: Machi
items.tagline: Find the echoes of life in every city
items.desc: A digital life platform for people living abroad, students, new immigrants and city explorers.
items.about: Machi is a digital life platform for people living abroad, students, new immigrants and city explorers. Around city info, community, housing, jobs, classifieds, local services and real experiences, it helps people settle into a new city faster.

items.name: Shangence
items.desc: A risk-assessment and capital stop-loss platform helping micro-entrepreneurs decide with data.
items.about: Shangence helps everyday founders run a professional assessment before committing their first capital — across cash safety, market demand, personal capability, customer acquisition and external constraints — producing a verification budget, stop-loss line and a 30-day action plan. It doesn't promise success; it helps you see the risk early. Operated separately in China and Japan.

items.name: More on the way
items.tagline: Bringing our craft to wider markets
items.desc: New business lines are incubating, bringing XICO's capability to broader markets.
items.about: New business lines like study-abroad and cross-border commerce are incubating — bringing XICO's AI, product and design capability to broader markets.

approach.title: How we work
approach.subtitle: Four principles that run through every XICO product.

principles.title: AI-native
principles.desc: We treat AI as the foundation of the product, not a feature bolted on afterwards.

principles.title: Design-led
principles.desc: We make aesthetics and experience the real competitive edge.

principles.title: Built to last
principles.desc: Systems that are maintainable, scalable and stand the test of time.

principles.title: Globally minded
principles.desc: Designed for multiple languages and markets from day one.

cta.title: Have something worth building?
cta.subtitle: Whether it's still just a sentence or a product that's half-built, let's talk. The parts we can build, we'll build with you.

footer.tagline: Building products that actually run — with AI, engineering and design. Connecting China, Japan and global markets.

about.title: Technology should feel human.
about.subtitle: XICO AI｜智希可 is a product and technology company connecting China, Japan and global markets.
story: The more powerful technology gets, the colder it can feel. We want the opposite: let it step back, so people get a little closer to life.
We build AI, software and products, but what we really care about is how they land in someone's hands — easy to use, and thoughtful.
We're not a big company, and we don't make big claims. We'd rather do a few things well — things that last, and travel beyond one market.

items.title: Build what matters
items.desc: Not building for its own sake — only what someone actually needs.

items.title: Make complexity feel simple
items.desc: However complex the system, it should feel simple in the user's hands.

items.title: Think globally, build carefully
items.desc: Made for the world, with care for every detail.

founder.name: Yao Kai · 姚凱
founder.quote: The best products are born at the intersection of engineering and design.
bio: I believe real product strength comes from building with real-world operations as the premise — seeing a thing through end to end, from finding the problem, defining requirements and designing the experience, to launch, payments, support and back office.

I bring a full-stack mindset that connects front-end, mobile, back-end, databases and cloud infrastructure into one coherent product — and I care about payments, admin dashboards, legal compliance and security: the details that make a service actually run.
I work across Chinese, Japanese and English, communicating and collaborating across cultures. XICO is where that belief becomes product.

services.title: From idea to launch — end to end.
services.subtitle: XICO offers full product capability, and can flexibly step in wherever you need.

manifesto.title: What matters is whether it's still here in three years.
body: Launch is just the start. We'd rather go slow and make something solid — good enough that, long after, people still want to open it.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Changsha Zhixike Technology Co., Ltd. (“XICO AI”, “we”) respects and protects your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect on xicoai.com, how we use it, and the rights you have.

sections.p: When you contact us through a form, a partnership enquiry or a job application, we collect the information you choose to provide — such as your name, email, company, message, and the résumé file you upload when applying. We also collect basic technical logs (time of visit, pages, device type) to keep the site secure and stable.

We use this information only to respond to your enquiries, process collaboration or job applications, and operate and improve the site. We do not sell your personal information or use it for unrelated purposes.
Information is stored on servers under our control and protected with reasonable technical and organizational measures. We keep it only as long as needed for the purposes above.
We use only essential local storage to remember your theme (light/dark) and language preference. We do not use it for cross-site tracking.
You can contact us at hi@xicoai.com at any time to access, correct or delete your personal information.
We may update this policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on this page. Questions? Email hi@xicoai.com.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: Welcome to xicoai.com. By accessing or using this site you agree to the following terms. This site is operated by Changsha Zhixike Technology Co., Ltd. (“XICO AI”).

sections.p: This site presents XICO AI's products, capabilities and company information, and provides ways to get in touch.

Unless otherwise stated, the text, design, marks and content of this site belong to XICO AI and may not be copied or used commercially without permission. Third-party brand marks belong to their respective owners.
Content on this site is provided “as is”. We aim to keep it accurate but make no warranty as to its completeness or timeliness.
To the extent permitted by law, XICO AI is not liable for any indirect or incidental loss arising from use of this site.
These terms are governed by the laws of the People's Republic of China.
For any questions about these terms, contact hi@xicoai.com.
